title: Soft Body Sound Stage
description: A BoomBox sits on a wobbly soft-body platform made of jelly-like cubes, while a Lantern hangs from a soft elastic rope above. The user drags the Lantern to swing it into the platform, causing soft-body ripple deformations that bounce the BoomBox around, with each collision changing the platform's color and stiffness parameters.
prompt:
Create a single HTML file using Three.js r170 (via importmap from cdn.jsdelivr.net) that implements an interactive soft-body simulation scene. Load BoomBox.glb and Lantern.glb using GLTFLoader. Scene setup: Place a PerspectiveCamera at (0, 3, 7) looking at the origin. Add ambient light (intensity 0.4) and two point lights, one warm (0xffaa44) at (3, 5, 2) and one cool (0x4488ff) at (-3, 4, -2). Create a soft-body platform as a 6x1x6 grid of small spheres connected by spring constraints at the origin. Each node stores position, velocity, and a rest-length to neighbors. Spring stiffness starts at 0.3 and damping at 0.02. Place the BoomBox model (scaled to 40x) on top of the platform center. Attach the Lantern model (scaled to 0.02x) to a soft elastic rope simulated as a chain of 8 spring-connected particles hanging from point (0, 5, 0). Interaction steps: (1) User clicks and drags the Lantern to pull it sideways. (2) On release, the Lantern swings on its elastic rope toward the platform. (3) On collision with the platform, apply impulse forces to nearby soft-body nodes causing a ripple deformation. (4) The BoomBox bounces upward based on the deformation magnitude beneath it. (5) Each collision increments a hit counter displayed in an HTML overlay. (6) After 3 hits, platform stiffness increases to 0.6 and color shifts to orange. (7) After 6 hits, stiffness becomes 0.9 and color shifts to red, making the platform nearly rigid. (8) A reset button restores all parameters. Validate that stiffness stays within [0.1, 1.0] and damping within [0.01, 0.1]. Use raycasting for mouse interaction. Animate the spring physics each frame with Verlet integration. Render with a ground plane and subtle fog for depth.

[State Exposure (required)]
Expose window.__3D_STATE__ updated every animation frame:
window.__3D_STATE__ = {
  platformStiffness: number,         // current spring stiffness of soft-body platform (0.0-1.0)
  lanternSwingAmplitude: number,         // maximum horizontal displacement of lantern from rest position in units
  boomBoxHeight: number,         // current Y position of BoomBox center above platform
  collisionCount: number,         // total number of lantern-platform collisions detected
  rippleIntensity: number,         // current deformation magnitude of platform (0.0-1.0)
  lanternVelocity: number,         // current speed of lantern in units per second
  boomBoxBouncing: boolean,         // true if BoomBox is currently airborne above platform
  ropeStretched: boolean,         // true if elastic rope is stretched beyond rest length
  platformColorHue: number,         // current HSL hue value of platform material (0-360)
  isDragging: boolean,         // true if user is currently dragging the lantern
}
